encounter.location: Cascade Community Health Center, 8205 SE Foster Road, Portland, OR 97206

screening.name: AHC HRSN screening food insecurity: food didn't last

conditions.name: mild intermittent asthma
conditions.note: Well controlled (ACT 22). Albuterol use 1-2 times/month. No exacerbations since 2022 episode. Lungs clear on exam.

conditions.name: overweight
conditions.note: Slow upward weight trend noted (BMI now 27.6, previously 27.0-27.2). Lifestyle counseling provided. Patient identifies barriers related to being a single working parent.

medications.name: albuterol sulfate 90 mcg/actuation HFA inhaler
medications.sig: 2 puffs every 4-6 hours as needed for asthma symptoms

document_references.description: Documents annual wellness exam including vital signs, physical examination (lungs clear, no acute findings), asthma review (well controlled, ACT 22), weight trend discussion with lifestyle counseling and barrier identification, PHQ-2 negative screen, AHC HRSN screening with borderline food insecurity finding below threshold, mammography shared decision-making discussion (patient defers at age 41), lab orders (CBC, CMP, lipid panel, HbA1c), and albuterol refill.
